name: POSITRON CORP
summary: PART I Organization Positron Corporation (the Company or Positron) was incorporated under the laws of the State of Texas in 1983. Unless the context requires otherwise, in this report the terms we, us, our, the Company, and Positron refer to Positron Corporation. Corporate History Positron Corporation was incorporated as a Texas corporation in 1983 with its corporate headquarters in North Tonawanda, New York. Nature of Business.
